examples: The chase is always much more exciting than the conquest anyway.
The play is being widely read as an allegory of imperialist conquest.
The invasion is known as the Norman Conquest, and it is very important for two reasons.
In a conquest that typifies the age, Home Depot recently knocked Sears off the Dow Jones industrial average.
If you want to record a marathon Conquest match in Battlefield 3, have at it.
